headlines.title: Officials identify man killed by Secret Service after opening fire near White House
headlines.description: The White House is on lockdown after dozens of gunshots were heard outside on Saturday evening.

headlines.title: White House shooting marks another incident in a string of political violence
headlines.description: The shooting at the White House Saturday evening is just the latest act of political violence carried out in President Donald Trump’s orbit in recent weeks.

headlines.title: Agreement on Iran war ‘largely negotiated,’ Trump says amid fragile ceasefire
headlines.description: Officials from the U.S. and Iran appear to be nearing a deal to end the ongoing Middle East conflict, according to public statements from President Donald Trump and officials from both nations Saturday

headlines.title: Special Report: Secret Service kill man who opened fire outside of White House
headlines.description: The U.S. Secret Service shot and killed a person who opened fire at a security checkpoint in an exchange of gunfire that briefly locked down the White House, officials said. NBC News correspondents have the latest on the shooting.

headlines.title: Gunshots heard near White House
headlines.description: Dozens of gunshots were heard near the White House Saturday evening, putting the White House on lockdown. Reporters at the North Lawn were rushed inside by Secret Service. NBC News’ Julie Tsirkin witnessed the incident.

headlines.title: Pentagon releases newly declassified UFO files
headlines.description: The Pentagon released a new batch of declassified UFO files following President Trump’s pledge to make those government files public. NBC News’ Courtney Kube reports.

headlines.title: Absence of USAID likely slowed Ebola detection and response, former officials say
headlines.description: The Trump administration hollowed out USAID last year, but the State Department denied the changes have hampered its response.

headlines.title: Extended Interview: Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio
headlines.description: On the sidelines of the Trump-Xi Summit in Beijing, NBC News' Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio to discuss China policy, the war with Iran, the future of Cuba, and more.

headlines.title: Map: How much you pay in federal and state gas taxes
headlines.description: As national gas price averages head toward $5 per gallon, one state has already suspended its gas tax, and now President Donald Trump and his Cabinet are talking about doing the same.

headlines.title: Justice Department deletes press releases on charges against Jan. 6 rioters
headlines.description: The Justice Department has removed press releases detailing the charges against hundreds of individuals who participated in the Jan.

headlines.title: Ted Cruz says GOP senators screamed at Todd Blanche in ‘anti-weaponization’ fund briefing
headlines.description: Senate Republicans met with the acting attorney general to discuss the $1.8 billion fund, which ultimately derailed a vote on a bill to fund ICE and Border Patrol

headlines.title: Donald Trump Jr. and Bettina Anderson get married in Florida
headlines.description: Donald Trump Jr., the president’s oldest son, married socialite Bettina Anderson on Thursday in West Palm Beach, Florida, according to Palm Beach County records
